LightningComponentBundle.description: All-in-one shell laying the three modularized Term Builder tiles (Negotiation Context, Terms Rail, Term Workspace) in the original two-column layout. Tiles sync over the DLM Term Builder message channel; drop them individually for a custom layout.

property.name: accountId
property.label: Preselected Account Id
property.description: Optional Account Id to preselect on load, forwarded to the header tile. Usually left blank; a c__accountId URL parameter also works.

property.name: quoteRecordId
property.label: Preselected Negotiation (Quote) Id
property.description: Optional Quote Id to open directly on load, forwarded to the header tile. Usually left blank; a c__quoteId URL parameter also works.
